text.title: Vision Basics — Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end Claude Sonnet extraction of an invoice image with resize, base64, schema-in-prompt, and retry-on-validation-error.

example.code:
import base64, hashlib, io, json from pathlib import Path from typing import Optional import anthropic from PIL import Image from pydantic import BaseModel, ValidationError
CACHE = Path("out/vision/cache"); CACHE.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
class ImageResult(BaseModel): description: str text_content: Optional[str] confidence: str # "high" | "low"
def prepare(path: str, max_px: int = 1024): img = Image.open(path) img.thumbnail((max_px, max_px), Image.LANCZOS) fmt = img.format or "PNG" buf = io.BytesIO(); img.save(buf, format=fmt, quality=85) mt = {"JPEG":"image/jpeg","PNG":"image/png","WEBP":"image/webp"}.get(fmt, "image/png") return buf.getvalue(), mt
SCHEMA = ImageResult.model_json_schema()
def extract(path: str, task: str, model: str = "claude-sonnet-4-5"): img_bytes, mt = prepare(path) b64 = base64.standard_b64encode(img_bytes).decode() key = hashlib.sha256(img_bytes + task.encode() + b"anthropic" + model.encode()).hexdigest() cache_file = CACHE / f"{key}.json" if cache_file.exists(): return {**json.loads(cache_file.read_text()), "cached": True, "cache_key": key, "provider":"anthropic","model":model,"status":"ok","retries":0,"image_count":1}
client = anthropic.Anthropic() prompt = f"{task}\nReturn JSON matching this schema (no prose):\n{json.dumps(SCHEMA)}" for attempt in range(3): resp = client.messages.create( model=model, max_tokens=1024, messages=[{"role":"user","content":[ {"type":"image","source":{"type":"base64","media_type":mt,"data":b64}}, {"type":"text","text": prompt}]}]) raw = resp.content[0].text.strip() if raw.startswith("```"): raw = raw.strip("`").lstrip("json\n") try: parsed = ImageResult(**json.loads(raw)) out = {"status":"ok","description":parsed.description, "text_content":parsed.text_content,"confidence":parsed.confidence, "provider":"anthropic","model":model,"cache_key":key, "cached":False,"image_count":1,"retries":attempt} cache_file.write_text(json.dumps(out)) return out except (json.JSONDecodeError, ValidationError) as e: prompt = (f"Previous response caused: {e}. Return ONLY JSON matching: " f"{json.dumps(SCHEMA)}") return {"status":"error","error":"retry budget exhausted","retries":2, "description":"","text_content":None,"confidence":"low", "provider":"anthropic","model":model,"cache_key":key,"cached":False,"image_count":1}
print(json.dumps(extract("invoice.png", "Extract store_name, invoice_number, total. Use null for missing fields."), indent=2, default=str))
